response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Currently at re:cinq doing AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling work using TypeScript and Node.js. Strong track record with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) demonstrated at Optilyz and current role. Main gaps are lack of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright mentions—though the depth of engineering expertise makes these easily acquirable.
strengths: Proven expertise with core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB demonstrated at Optilyz (2021-2025) and current role
Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly addressing the AI agent development requirement
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, microservices architecture, Docker/Kubernetes expertise, and history of code quality focus across 20 years
concerns: Nest.js not explicitly mentioned in resume; while learnable for this caliber, it's listed as primary stack
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not highlighted; testing is clearly valued but framework preferences not stated
Recent focus appears more infrastructure/tooling-oriented (AI agents, MCP) than core product fullstack work; last major product role was Optilyz (2021-2025)
